_comment: Target `main` branch-protection policy for this repository. Apply with:
Requires PR review + Code Owner review + the listed status checks, and
forbids force-pushes and branch deletion. Root CODEOWNERS maps
`* @cinatra-ai/maintainers`, so the Code Owner requirement binds. Review and
adjust the required-check contexts if those workflows are renamed.
NOTE: a `v*` tag triggers a production deploy (build-image.yml -> ops), so
tag/release creation must be restricted to maintainers SEPARATELY (Settings ->
Tags, or a `v*` tag protection rule) — branch protection does not cover tags.
